name: Shiny Gmail Single Email Processor Child V2.6 Lean

parameters.query:
SELECT gmail_message_id, status, category, source, confidence, reasoning, processed_at
FROM gmail_message_ledger
WHERE account = $1
  AND gmail_message_id = $2
  AND status = 'completed'
LIMIT 1;

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ contents: [{ role: 'user', parts: [{ text: `You are Shiny Gmail Automation, a strict inbox classifier.\\n\\nCategories:\\n1. unimportant = spam, newsletters, promotions, marketing, sales, coupons, generic automated clutter.\\n2. receipts = purchase receipts, order confirmations, payment confirmations, invoices, shipping/delivery notices, billing confirmations.\\n3. important = personal messages, work emails, bank/financial alerts, security alerts, OTP, 2FA, password resets, government, legal, medical, school, insurance.\\n4. email-subs = services/platforms the user actively subscribed to and may want to manage/cancel. Not newsletters/promos.\\n5. please-review = low-confidence or ambiguous emails.\\n\\nRules:\\n- If confidence is below 0.8, return please-review.\\n- Reasoning must be one short sentence.\\n\\nEmail JSON:\\n${JSON.stringify({ messageId: $json.messageId, threadId: $json.threadId, sender: $json.sender, from: $json.fromRaw, subject: String($json.subject || '').slice(0, 200), date: $json.date, snippet: String($json.snippet || '').slice(0, 300) })}` }] }], generationConfig: { temperature: 0.1, maxOutputTokens: 256, responseMimeType: 'application/json', responseSchema: { type: 'OBJECT', properties: { messageId: { type: 'STRING' }, category: { type: 'STRING', enum: ['unimportant','receipts','important','email-subs','please-review'] }, confidence: { type: 'NUMBER' }, reasoning: { type: 'STRING' } }, required: ['messageId','category','confidence','reasoning'] } } }) }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO gmail_message_ledger (
  account,
  gmail_message_id,
  thread_id,
  sender,
  subject,
  category,
  source,
  confidence,
  reasoning,
  status,
  error_message,
  processed_at,
  created_at,
  updated_at
)
VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,$5,$6,$7,$8::numeric,$9,'completed',NULL,now(),now(),now())
ON CONFLICT (account, gmail_message_id)
DO UPDATE SET
  thread_id = EXCLUDED.thread_id,
  sender = EXCLUDED.sender,
  subject = EXCLUDED.subject,
  category = EXCLUDED.category,
  source = EXCLUDED.source,
  confidence = EXCLUDED.confidence,
  reasoning = EXCLUDED.reasoning,
  status = 'completed',
  error_message = NULL,
  processed_at = now(),
  updated_at = now()
RETURNING account, gmail_message_id, status, category, source;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [$('Prepare Final Category').first().json.account, $('Prepare Final Category').first().json.messageId, $('Prepare Final Category').first().json.threadId || '', $('Prepare Final Category').first().json.sender || '', $('Prepare Final Category').first().json.subject || '(no subject)', $('Prepare Final Category').first().json.category || 'please-review', $('Prepare Final Category').first().json.source || 'unknown', $('Prepare Final Category').first().json.confidence ?? 0, $('Prepare Final Category').first().json.reasoning || 'No reasoning provided.'] }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO gmail_message_ledger (
  account,
  gmail_message_id,
  thread_id,
  sender,
  subject,
  category,
  source,
  confidence,
  reasoning,
  status,
  error_message,
  processed_at,
  created_at,
  updated_at
)
VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,$5,$6,$7,$8::numeric,$9,'failed',$10,NULL,now(),now())
ON CONFLICT (account, gmail_message_id)
DO UPDATE SET
  thread_id = EXCLUDED.thread_id,
  sender = EXCLUDED.sender,
  subject = EXCLUDED.subject,
  category = EXCLUDED.category,
  source = EXCLUDED.source,
  confidence = EXCLUDED.confidence,
  reasoning = EXCLUDED.reasoning,
  status = 'failed',
  error_message = EXCLUDED.error_message,
  updated_at = now()
RETURNING account, gmail_message_id, status, error_message;

parameters.content:
🏷️ **Label Ordering Rule (V2.6)**

1. Apply CATEGORY label first
2. Apply PROCESSED label second
3. Upsert ledger completed last

Never reverse this order.
Category failure → no processed → no ledger complete.
Gmail processed label = visible commit point.

V2.6: Restore nodes removed; downstream uses $('Prepare Final Category') refs.
Failure stage detection inverted for correct attribution.

🤖 **Gemini Fallback Rules (V2.6)**

• API failure → please-review (sanitized reasoning)
• Parse failure → please-review
• messageId mismatch → please-review
• Confidence < 0.8 → please-review
• Invalid category → please-review

No email is ever silently lost.
V2.6: Raw error text kept in errorMessage only, not persisted in reasoning.
